name: io.github.jdhart81/agent-verified-relay
description: Viridis Verified: wrap any MCP server with consequences. Relays tools/call through tamper-evident receipt chains (request/response hashes, outcome, latency), idempotent on call_id, failures receipted as evidence. Composes with surety bonds, arbitration, and reputation. 10 free calls/day, then $0.02/call.
